observations.polarity: Rejection of comforting lies in favor of harsh reality
observations.summary: Dan rejects the offer of a 'raft' symbolizing a life built on comforting falsehoods, preferring the painful truth even if it leads to his demise.

left_evidence.quote: You offer me a raft for a life of soft lies?

right_evidence.quote: I'd rather drink the sea and sink than live one more day in your filth.

bridge_evidence.quote: I just saw what that bought my father.
